## Topic
What aspect of the design or research are you discussing?

## Context

- Which docs/ files does this relate to?
- Is this about the reference implementation or the broader architecture?

## Your Perspective
Describe your thoughts, questions, or proposed alternatives.

## References
Link to any relevant papers, specifications, or existing implementations.
